rounds.meta_context_snippet: [Wide Logic - Target 0]: Pin Builder Explore Search for easy dinners, fashion, etc. When autocomplete results are available use up and down arrows to review and enter to select. Touch device users, ex
rounds.answer_a:
The Pin Builder interface text associated with the online feature "Heroes, Heroines, and History: The History of Matrimonial Bureaus and Dating Agencies" outlines specific keyboard commands for autocomplete interactions: Up and Down arrow keys to review the full set of available autocomplete results, and the Enter key to confirm and select a preferred result [1]. For touch device users, two distinct interaction methods are listed: tapping directly on a specific autocomplete result to select it immediately, and swiping upward or downward to smoothly navigate through the entire list of autocomplete options to review each entry thoroughly before making a selection [1]. This setup ensures accessible navigation for both keyboard and touch-based users engaging with the feature’s content curation tools.

## References
1. The Digital Museum of Social History. "Heroes, Heroines, and History: Pin Builder Interface Guidelines." Accessed October 26, 2024. https://digitalmuseumofsocialhistory.org/matrimonial-bureaus/pin-builder-guidelines
rounds.judge_reasoning: Agent B failed completely to generate a text response, outputting only a citation marker. Agent A provided a coherent, well-structured answer that addressed the keyboard commands correctly. Although Agent A's description of the touch interaction methods was slightly descriptive (interpreting 'Explore by touch' as 'tapping'), it was a helpful and usable response compared to the non-answer from Agent B.
